titleStmt.title: SII 20.67: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 67. (B.K. No. 59 of 1936-37.) KOṆḌGŪḶI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed into the left outer wall of Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 32, Sarvajit, Chaitra, Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1107, March 25, f.d.t., ·36. But there was no eclipse on that day.

This badly damaged inscription registers a gift of land to the temple of Jyōtīśvara for worship, offerings and repairs and for the maintenance of the priest of the temple. It mentions the Sarvanamasya-agrahāra Koṇḍaguḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥ sivā[ya .] svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī
prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara
paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ sa
luttamire saṁkathā
rājyaṁgeyyatta
dānavāgi koṭṭa sarvva
namasya śrīmadagrahāraṁ koṁḍaguḷiya
Aśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa
śvara cūḍāmaṇi
mahēśvara śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 32 ne
ya sarvvajitsaṁvatsarada caitradamāvāse sōma
vāra sūryyagrahaṇasarvvadalu tamma māḍisida śi
vālayaṁ śrī jōtīśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ sarvva praje
pūjāri brāhmaṇana jīvitakkaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ
ya gēṇa kōla matta
ttu dēvarige biṭṭa sīme sarvvamānyavāgi bōvaṁge biṭṭa ma
tta 2 Antu mattaru 10 dēvarige biṁnāṇikeya biṭṭa sa
rvvamānyavāgi biṭṭa matta 1 mālagāṟa
damaged
Digital edition of SII 20.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
